nasb.text: Or does not the potter have a right over the clay, to make from the same lump one vessel for honorable use and another for common use?

esv.text: Has the potter no right over the clay, to make out of the same lump one vessel for honorable use and another for dishonorable use?

cnv.text: 陶匠難道沒有權用同一團的泥，又做貴重的、又做卑賤的器皿嗎？

ccb.text: 陶匠难道不可以从一团泥中拿一部分造贵重的器皿，又拿一部分造平凡的器皿吗？

csbs.text: 难道陶匠没有权柄从同一团泥中，既造出贵重的器皿，又造出卑贱的器皿吗？
